results.title: Introducing Joom: "We make global trade easy and efficient via ...
results.snippet: Joom Marketplace is an e-commerce platform and mobile app that sells products from Asia and Europe in the most efficient and easy way possible.
results.summary:
# Introducing Joom: "We make global trade easy and efficient via technology"

July 19, 2024 by

Frank Calviño

***Photo courtesy of Deliver* **

Joom is an international group of e-commerce companies founded in June 2016 in Riga, Latvia. As of the beginning of 2024, Joom has amassed over 400 million users worldwide across iOS, Android, and Web.
The marketplace has 25 million monthly active users and 20 million active buyers, and in 2021, Joom joined the Product Safety Pledge initiative — an agreement to cooperate with the EU Member States to remove dangerous products from its websites. Joom has also become the first non-VLOP (i.e., not a very large online platform, a term referring to platforms with more than 45 million average active monthly recipients) to join the DSA transparency database.
We are sure that Joom will be one of the global titans of e-commerce, and subsequently, we wanted to talk directly with them to learn more about their strategies, plans for the future, and, overall, their unique vision for e-commerce, marketplaces, and B2B. 

To do so, we had the amazing opportunity to interview Marina Khanayeva, CEO of JMS (Joom Marketplace Solutions), to learn more about this e-commerce powerhouse group of companies. Let us begin!

## Joom democratizing access to global e-commerce

In short, we could say that Joom Marketplace is an e-commerce platform and mobile app that sells products from Asia and Europe in the most efficient and easy way possible, thus helping people to save money when shopping online. JMS provides cross-border capabilities of Joom infrastructure and technologies to local marketplaces globally.

But alongside JMS the Joom group of companies also consists of JoomPro, a tech-enabled turnkey solution for B2B importing goods from China - this is the correct wording for JoomPro (today JoomPro is present in the Brazilian market only).
Finally, Joom also has Joom Pulse, a solution for sellers in Brazil that boosts their sales. It helps analyze marketplace categories and products to make better market decisions and increase business profitability. Overall, it is clear that Joom, as a group of companies specializing in e-commerce solutions, has become a powerhouse. But how, when, and why was Joom created?
**When and how was Joom founded?**

**Marina:** Joom was founded in 2016 in Riga, Latvia. Founders had this big idea to shake up online shopping using mobile tech. The goal was to cut out the middlemen in global e-commerce and give people direct access to quality products from all over the world.
**Why Joom says it is ‘mobile first’?**

**Marina:** At that time, several well-known international marketplaces existed, but they all started with a web version. We chose to begin with a mobile version inspired by trends in China, the most progressive country in terms of internet and mobile phone penetration.

In China, e-commerce accounts for around 50% of general trade, which is unprecedented. It was clear that the world was rapidly shifting to mobile shopping, driven by the growth of social networks.

…

**Marina:** Joom stands out from other marketplaces in several key ways:
- **We operate on a direct-from-supplier model**, sourcing products from suppliers across over 15 countries. I find it unique when users get access to authentic products.
- **Global penetration:** From the beginning, the Joom app has been available to users in over 50 countries. Our in-house supports this wide-reach developed B2C logistics solutions, which I am particularly proud of, as I played a direct role in its architecture.
- **Our marketplace doesn't stick to just one type of product**. We've got everything from affordable items from China to top brands and premium goods. Think of unique finds from Japan, K-pop gear and beauty products from South Korea, Ayurvedic skincare from India, and specialized stuff for car buffs and sports fans—you name it, we've probably got it.
**What business sectors or product categories are the ones Joom sells the most?**

**Marina: ** A significant portion of Joom's audience consists of women, which naturally drives high demand in categories such as fashion and beauty. Our marketplace also shines in home and kitchen items, baby goods, and consumer electronics. While these categories form the heart of what we offer, we're not stopping there—as mentioned before, we've got a wide range of products to meet diverse needs and preferences.

## “Joom’s main competitive advantage lies in its mission: To make global trade easy and efficient via technology." Marina Khanayeva, CEO at JMS

**Marina:** Joom is an IT company that's all about cutting-edge tech to optimize processes and stay ahead in quality. We've got a team of top developers, ML, and prominent data experts pushing boundaries, and being part of that team is a blast—it's all about innovation and excellence in everything they do.

This driving force behind Joom pushed them to launch B2B services.
**Tell us a bit more about B2B services.  **

The idea of using cutting-edge tech to optimize processes got us thinking: why not bring this same power to B2B clients? That's where JMS comes in, our B2B service for marketplaces and e-commerce platforms I'm leading.

## Joom believes in offering top-notch products

In 2023 Joom opened its HQ in Lisbon, Portugal. It also has offices in China, Hong-Kong, Brazil, the USA and Germany. This configuration has made Joom a global organization that is fully committed to providing customers in the EU with the highest possible quality products. No concessions are given. Top-notch quality is Joom's commitment.
**Let’s discuss the quality of Joom products, how Joom handles this, and how you can guarantee a quality level in the marketplace. Do you control the quality of the products placed in Joom by the merchants?**

**Marina: ** Quality control at Joom is all about making sure our products are top-notch. This is achieved in several ways: we’ve got strict ‘Know Your Customer’ protocols in place to ensure we only allow trusted sellers onto our platform. We check product quality using a combination of people, processes, and on-site audits.
The people involved can be a dedicated team of 70+ moderators who use AI tools to check pictures, marketing material, safety aspects, and quality history. In addition there are 50+ Key Account Managers who regularly visit and audit our seller's facilities to ensure high standards for product quality are met. To ensure our customers get the best deal (i.e. the lowest price) we streamline, compare and cross-check duplicate products with those on the market.
**How does Joom deal with the current EU quality controls and data protection legislation? Please brief us on these two topics.**

**Marina: ** Since 2021, Joom has joined and signed two voluntary Product Safety Pledge initiatives — an agreement to cooperate with the EU Member States to remove dangerous products from its websites quickly and efficiently. Joom is fully prepared for updates in EU regulations, including the General Product Safety Regulation (GPSR) and the Digital Services Act (DSA).
Regulators are wildly focused on making online shopping safer with stricter product safety and consumer protection laws when Chinese cross-border giants are penetrating global markets. Joom meets these minimum standards and establishes new industry standards and processes to safeguard customers.

## “Joom has a robust privacy compliance program designed to comply with privacy laws worldwide, primarily focusing on the EU’s GDPR. Privacy matters are an integral part of teams' daily work and are raised to the attention or senior leadership following risk management policies.” Marina Khanayeva, CEO at JMS.

**Could you share more details about JMS, the business unit you're currently heading?**

**Marina: ** JMS empowers local marketplaces by enabling cross-border commerce on their platforms. In other words, we integrate an unlimited product catalog into our client’s platform and handle direct delivery to the consumer. All the advantages we've discussed—our wide assortment of unique products from 15+ origins, reliable logistics to 50+ destinations, and cutting-edge technologies—are now available to our B2B clients.
With Chinese cross-border marketplaces aggressively entering various markets, local players have two strategies: build barriers for inbound products or seize the opportunity and move quickly. JMS helps local marketplaces compete with cross-border giants by offering their loyal consumers access to products from around the world.

The future of marketplaces lies in combining local and cross-border supply.
**Please explain the difference between Joom Marketplace and Joom Pro.**

**Marina: ** Well, Joom is a B2C marketplace, a platform for shopping globally for people like you and me. JoomPro is a B2B cross-border marketplace facilitating wholesale purchases from China. Primarily targeting sellers on local marketplaces, it is currently exclusive to Brazil (https://joom.pro/pt-br), with plans to expand to additional countries in 2025.
**What does JoomPro offer to B2B merchants and customers?**

**Marina: ** JoomPro is about making B2B cross-border procurement as easy and efficient as possible. We aim to make B2B transactions as simple as B2C. Here’s what JoomPro brings to the table:
JoomPro streamlines the process of sourcing and purchasing products from Asian suppliers, making it smooth and hassle-free. We support bulk ordering, so businesses can buy larger quantities at discounted rates, put them at the local fulfillment center, and sell them locally. 

By making cross-border trade more accessible and efficient, JoomProtransforms B2B procurement into a process as straightforward and user-friendly as B2C transactions. I find this service exciting because it helps develop SMEs locally and empowers them with tools like Joom Pulse.
**Which one is Joom's main goal for the next five years?**

**Marina:  ** Over the next five years, Joom has some big plans:
1. **Exponential Growth:** We want to significantly boost our user base and expand our market presence worldwide.
2. **Unique Product Origins:** We're looking to diversify our product offerings with unique items from even more countries, making our marketplace more diverse and exclusive.
3. **B2B Services:** We're focused on enhancing our B2B services, especially through JMS and JoomPro. These platforms are designed to offer tailored solutions and support for seamless trade, helping us better serve our business customers.
It's an exciting time for us as we aim to grow and innovate in multiple areas!

By focusing on these areas, we aim to become a global leader in e-commerce, making global trade easy and efficient for everyone through cutting-edge technology and comprehensive services.

Tagged with: cross-border, e-commerce, Europe, Joom, Joom Marketplace, logistics, online shopping

results.title: Simplifique a sua importação da China - JoomPro
results.snippet: A JoomPro é uma gerenciadora de importações especializada no mercado da China, que ajuda empresas a importar de forma simples e segura, alavancando seus ...
results.summary:
Um parceiro único para cuidar de todas as etapas da sua importação
A JoomPro é uma gerenciadora de importações especializada no mercado da China, que ajuda empresas a importar de forma simples e segura, alavancando seus negócios com produtos variados, de qualidade e altamente lucrativos.
Conta com um catálogo online e oferece uma solução de ponta-a-ponta, cuidando de todas as etapas da importação — negociação com fornecedores, fabricação, personalização e controle de qualidade dos produtos, documentação, desembaraço aduaneiro e logística da origem até o estoque dos clientes.
Com times em Portugal, Brasil e China, seu serviço é fluido e eficiente, com foco na redução de custos, mitigação de riscos e economia de tempo para que você possa cuidar do seu negócio, enquanto a JoomPro cuida das suas importações.
Nossos parceiros
JoomPro pelo mundo
A JoomPro faz parte do Grupo Joom e conta com escritórios no Brasil, na China, em Hong-Kong e em Portugal
Grupo Joom
Fundado em junho de 2016 em Riga, na Letônia, e com escritórios na Europa, Ásia e América Latina, o Grupo Joom oferece um ecossistema de soluções para o e-commerce, auxiliando consumidores e empresas no seu dia a dia
JoomPro
A JoomPro é uma gerenciadora de importações especializada no mercado da China, que ajuda empresas a importar de forma simples e segura, oferecendo uma solução de ponta-a-ponta — desde a busca por fornecedores até a entrega no estoque
Joom Pulse
Joom Pulse é uma plataforma de dados projetada com inteligência artificial para ajudar vendedores a otimizar suas operações em marketplaces, maximizando suas vendas, entendendo o comportamento dos concorrentes e tomando decisões informadas

results.title: Joom Group
results.snippet: JoomPro is the first and only end-to-end cross-border B2B marketplace. It serves small, medium, and large businesses, handling orders of any size from start ...
results.summary:
We Make Global Trade Better via Technology
We are building an ecosystem of high-tech services for everyone involved in international trade.
Consumers, small and medium businesses, large sellers, and factories can use our solutions to buy, sell, trade, analyze trends, and ship orders of all sizes around the world.
Our extensive experience across Asia, Latin America, Europe, and the USA enables us to deeply understand our clients and offer them truly useful and unique solutions.
Our offices are located worldwide in Portugal, China, Brazil, Mexico, Germany, and Latvia.
Joom's headquarters is in Lisbon, Portugal.
# Businesses
**Joom** is a global cross-border marketplace where millions can find anything they want at fair prices
**JMS** is a unique solution for local marketplaces that want to expand their assortment with international inventory.
By simply integrating JMS via API or white-label solution, marketplaces get instant access to millions of products from all over the world
**JoomPro** is the first and only end-to-end cross-border B2B marketplace.
It serves small, medium, and large businesses, handling orders of any size from start to finish.
Today, JoomPro operates in Brazil and Mexico, with plans to expand into other markets
**JoomPulse ** is an AI analytics tool for Mercado Livre sellers, providing insights into the most profitable products and fastest-growing categories — helping sellers boost their profits with data-driven decisions

results.title: Importe Como um Pro: Alibaba, Made in China e JoomPro
results.snippet: Resumo: Conheça as diferenças entre Alibaba, Made in China e JoomPro e como escolher a melhor plataforma para suas importações.
results.summary:
O Alibaba é uma das maiores plataformas de e-commerce do mundo, ligando fabricantes chineses a compradores internacionais.
...
A plataforma é especialmente voltada para grandes pedidos de atacado, e seu modelo de negócios B2B (business-to-business) significa que você pode negociar diretamente com os fornecedores para obter preços mais competitivos.
...
**Explorando o JoomPro**
O JoomPro, diferente das outras plataformas, é mais recente e oferece um modelo B2C (business-to-consumer), onde o foco reside em encomendas de menor volume e uma experiência de compra mais próxima do varejo.
É bastante conhecida pelo seu uso amigável e interface intuitiva, além de fretes gratuitos em muitos dos itens disponíveis.
Este site é adequado para pequenos empresários que estão iniciando a importação e não têm grande capital para encomendas de alto volume.
Além disso, o JoomPro disponibiliza suporte direto ao cliente em várias línguas, facilitando a comunicação para os compradores.
Contudo, é importante ser cauteloso com prazos de entrega e qualidade dos produtos, já que a plataforma é focada em pequenas quantidades e preços competitivos.
**Fatores a Considerar ao Importar** **Legislação e Regulamentação:**Entender as normas de importação do seu país é essencial.
No Brasil, o site da Receita Federal é uma fonte valiosa para compreensão das regras.
**Custos e Logística:**Inclua taxas de importação, fretes e seguros nas suas projeções de custo para evitar surpresas financeiras.
**Fornecedores Confiáveis:**Sempre verifique a autenticidade e a reputação dos fornecedores, utilizando plataformas como a Better Business Bureau para garantir negociações seguras.
**Conclusão**
...
Oferecemos consultoria personalizada para ajudar a planejar sua estratégia de importação, otimizar custos e mitigar riscos.

results.summary:
```
Joom is an international group of e-commerce companies.
Our mission is to Make Global Trade Better via Technology.
We are here to transform the largest industry in the world, global trade, which today accounts for 62.5% of global GDP, making it more transparent, efficient, and technology-driven.
Joom was founded in 2016 in Riga, Latvia.
In 2023, we opened our headquarters in Lisbon, Portugal.
We also have offices in China, Brazil, the USA, and Germany.
Today, Joom Group brings together the following businesses:
Joom, a global cross-border marketplace where millions can find anything they want at fair prices.
JoomPro, the first and only end-to-end cross-border B2B marketplace.
It serves small, medium, and large businesses, handling orders of any size from start to finish.
Today, JoomPro operates in Brazil and Mexico, with plans to expand into other markets.
JoomPulse, an AI analytics tool for Mercado Livre sellers, providing insights into the most profitable products and fastest-growing categories — helping sellers boost their profits with data-driven decisions.
Onfy, an online pharmaceutical marketplace in Germany.
```

results.title: 2025 China (Guangzhou) Cross-Border E-Commerce Trade Fair to ...
results.snippet: ... JoomPro), Africa (JUMIA ... Cross-border e-commerce has rapidly developed as an innovative business model in China's foreign trade sector.
results.summary:
The 2025 China (Guangzhou) Cross-Border E-Commerce Trade Fair is set to take place from August 15-17 in Guangdong's capital, Guangzhou, surpassing previous editions in scale, exhibitor quality, and international participation.
With over 1,000 premium suppliers, 40 leading cross-border e-commerce platforms, and nearly 200 ecosystem service providers attending the fair, it promises to be a significant event.
Top e-commerce platforms, including Amazon, SHEIN, Temu, Walmart, and AliExpress, will expand their presence alongside more than 40 emerging market e-commerce platforms from Latin America (Mercado Libre, JoomPro), Africa (JUMIA, Kikuu), Europe (OTTO, Rakuten, Allegro), and Southeast Asia (Shopee, Lazada), reflecting the fair's global appeal.
Twenty-one cities will showcase Guangdong specialty industries, covering lighting, apparel, shoes, appliances, toys, ceramics, jewelry, and hardware.

results.title: JoomPro: Encontre fornecedores confiáveis sem sair da análise
results.snippet: Importe da China com previsibilidade, segurança, e sem burocracia – mesmo investindo pouco. Por: Equipe de Marketing de Produto da JoomPulse. A ...
results.summary:
## Importe da China com previsibilidade, segurança, e sem burocracia – mesmo investindo pouco
...
O coração do trabalho da JoomPro é sua capacidade de apresentar fornecedores relevantes e verificados sem que você precise sair da tela de análise de produtos.
Nossa rede conta com mais de 10.000 fornecedores pré-qualificados, abrangendo praticamente todas as categorias de produtos disponíveis para importação.
O algoritmo inteligente não apenas identifica fornecedores que oferecem o produto em questão, mas também os classifica com base em fatores críticos como:
…
**2.
...
Nosso widget incorpora um assistente de importação passo a passo que orienta você em todo o processo:
- Documentação necessária para cada tipo de produto
- Requisitos específicos de certificação por categoria
- Opções de frete internacional com comparativo de custos e prazos
- Cálculo automático de impostos e taxas de importação
- Cronograma detalhado do processo logístico
Esta orientação especializada elimina incertezas e garante que mesmo equipes com pouca experiência em importação possam conduzir o processo com confiança e eficiência.
**3.
...
O impacto mais direto de utilizar a JoomPro nos resultados financeiros vem da significativa otimização de margens que ele proporciona.
Nossos primeiros usuários reportam um aumento médio de 15% nas margens de lucro dos produtos adquiridos através da plataforma.
Este ganho é resultado de múltiplos fatores:
- Acesso direto a fabricantes, eliminando intermediários
- Comparação fácil entre múltiplos fornecedores para negociação de melhores preços
- Redução de custos logísticos através de opções otimizadas de frete
- Minimização de erros e retrabalhos no processo de importação
- Antecipação do ciclo de vendas devido à redução no tempo de aquisição
…
Da próxima vez que estiver analisando produtos na plataforma, você notará o novo widget JoomPro na interface.
Ao identificar uma oportunidade promissora, basta clicar no botão “Importe este produto” para ativar a funcionalidade.
**Transformando o Futuro da Aquisição de Produtos**
O lançamento do widget JoomPro representa muito mais que uma nova funcionalidade – é um passo significativo em nossa missão de transformar a maneira como empresas brasileiras adquirem produtos para seus portfólios.
